positive: A minimalist illustration featuring a stylized constellation of woodland animals (fox, deer, owl, bunny) nestled among geometric forest elements and glowing moons. The style is modern flat design with thick black outlines, high contrast, and negative space usage. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo blue, creamy gold, burnt orange, and forest green. The composition is centrally arranged, suitable for a square patch or tee print, ensuring clear, recognizable silhouettes against a solid background. The lighting is implied by the glow of the constellations, emphasizing clean lines and strong visual separation.
